name: Cabbage Rolls (Hungarian)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion in lard until soft.
2. Add paprika to the cooked onion.
3. Combine ground pork, salt, pepper, and rice.
4. Pour the onion mixture over the meat mixture and mix well.
5. Remove the core from the cabbage and steam until the leaves just wilt.
6. Separate the leaves and remove the back rib from the cabbage with a knife.
7. Wrap the meat mixture in cabbage leaves and place in a pot.
8. Pour tomato soup (or ketchup) over the rolls.
9. Add enough water to cover and some to spare.
10. Boil for 45 to 60 minutes.
